title: Gemini Chat Basics
description: Learn how to open Gemini, find the chat box, send your first prompt, and check for a response.

steps.instruction: Open Gemini in a new tab.
Click the main prompt/chat input area.
Type a short prompt in the input box.
Send your prompt and wait until Gemini response content appears.

title: Better Follow-Up Prompts
description: Practice asking a follow-up question to improve or refine the first answer.

steps.instruction: Open Gemini and locate the chat input area.
steps.coachText: This is the message input. You can type prompts here to chat with Gemini.

steps.instruction: Click the chat input area again for your follow-up.
steps.coachText: Click the input area so you can ask a follow-up question based on the previous response.

steps.instruction: Type a follow-up prompt asking Gemini to improve clarity.
steps.coachText: Type a refined follow-up prompt. Good follow-ups ask for clearer structure or better examples.

steps.instruction: Send it and wait for a new response block.
steps.coachText: After sending your follow-up, Gemini will generate a second response here.

title: Gemini Feature Tour
description: Learn what the + button, Tools menu, and model selector do.

steps.instruction: Open Gemini and locate the + Add file button.
steps.coachText: This + icon is the Add file button. Use it to attach files, Drive items, photos, and other context before sending your prompt.

steps.instruction: Click the + Add file button.
steps.coachText: Click the + Add file button to open the attachment menu.

steps.instruction: Review the + menu options.
steps.coachText: These options let you upload files, add from Drive, use photos, or bring data from NotebookLM.

steps.instruction: Locate the Tools button.
steps.coachText: The Tools area gives quick access to Gemini features like image generation, music, canvas, and guided learning.

steps.instruction: Click the Tools button.
steps.coachText: Click Tools to open the feature menu.

steps.instruction: Review the Tools menu items.
steps.coachText: This menu shows built-in capabilities such as Create images, Create music, Canvas, and Guided Learning.

steps.instruction: Locate the model selector (for example Pro).
steps.coachText: This selector controls which Gemini model behavior you use for this chat.

steps.instruction: Click the model selector.
steps.coachText: Click to open model options like Fast, Thinking, and Pro.

steps.instruction: Review the model options panel.
steps.coachText: Model options change speed and capability. Fast is quick, Thinking is deeper, and Pro is advanced.

title: Generate Images with Gemini
description: Learn how to use Gemini's built-in image generation to create pictures from text descriptions.

steps.instruction: Open Gemini and locate the Tools button.
steps.coachText: The Tools button opens a menu of Gemini's advanced capabilities including image creation.

steps.instruction: Click the Tools button to open the menu.
steps.coachText: Click Tools to reveal the available capabilities.

steps.instruction: Select 'Create image' from the Tools menu.
steps.coachText: This option activates Gemini's built-in image generation model (Imagen). Your next prompt will generate an image.

steps.instruction: Type an image description prompt (e.g., 'A sunset over mountains in watercolor style').
steps.coachText: Describe the image you want to generate. Be specific about subject, style, and mood for better results.

steps.instruction: Send the prompt and wait for the generated image to appear.
steps.coachText: Gemini will process your description and produce one or more images. This may take a few seconds.

title: Collaborative Editing with Canvas
description: Learn how to use Canvas for side-by-side collaborative document and code editing with Gemini.

steps.instruction: Open Gemini and locate the Tools button.
steps.coachText: Canvas is one of the advanced tools available in the Tools menu.

steps.instruction: Click the Tools button to open the menu.
steps.coachText: Click Tools to see Canvas and other editing features.

steps.instruction: Select 'Canvas' from the Tools menu.
steps.coachText: Canvas opens a side-by-side workspace where you can edit documents or code collaboratively with Gemini.

steps.instruction: Type a prompt asking Gemini to create content (e.g., 'Write a project proposal for a mobile app').
steps.coachText: Ask Gemini to produce content. Canvas mode will render it in an editable side panel.

steps.instruction: Send the prompt and wait for the Canvas side panel to appear.
steps.coachText: The Canvas workspace will appear on the right side of the screen with editable content.

title: Deep Research Mode
description: Learn how to use Deep Research for comprehensive, multi-source research reports with citations.

steps.instruction: Open Gemini and locate the Tools button.
steps.coachText: Deep Research is an advanced tool that produces structured research reports.

steps.instruction: Click the Tools button to open the menu.
steps.coachText: Click the Tools button to access Deep Research.

steps.instruction: Select 'Deep research' from the Tools menu.
steps.coachText: Deep Research tasks Gemini with a thorough multi-source investigation on your topic. It may take longer but produces comprehensive results.

steps.instruction: Type a research topic (e.g., 'Compare solar panel technologies for home use').
steps.coachText: Enter a topic you want thoroughly researched. The more specific your question, the better the results.

steps.instruction: Send the prompt and wait for the research plan or report to appear.
steps.coachText: Gemini will first show a research plan, then begin gathering information from multiple sources.

title: Upload & Analyze Files
description: Learn how to upload files (images, PDFs, documents) to Gemini for analysis and summarization.

steps.instruction: Open Gemini and locate the + (upload) button.
steps.coachText: The + button lets you attach files, photos, and Drive documents to your prompt for Gemini to analyze.

steps.instruction: Click the + button to open the upload menu.
steps.coachText: Click to see upload options: Upload files, Add from Drive, Photos.

steps.instruction: Review the upload menu options.
steps.coachText: You can upload local files, add documents from Google Drive, or select photos. Choose Upload files for this lesson.

steps.instruction: Select a file to upload (confirm manually after selecting).
steps.coachText: Pick any file — an image, PDF, or document. Gemini can analyze text, images, data tables, and more.

steps.instruction: Type a prompt asking Gemini to analyze the uploaded file (e.g., 'Summarize this document').
steps.coachText: After attaching your file, type what you want Gemini to do with it — summarize, extract data, translate, etc.

steps.instruction: Send the prompt and wait for Gemini's analysis.
steps.coachText: Gemini will process your file and respond with the analysis or summary you requested.

title: Mastering Response Controls
description: Learn how to modify, share, export, copy, and fact-check Gemini's responses.

steps.instruction: Open Gemini and send any prompt to get a response.
steps.coachText: Type any question or prompt into the input area to generate a response we can practice controlling.

steps.instruction: Type a prompt and send it.
steps.coachText: Type a question like 'Explain quantum computing in simple terms' and press Enter.

steps.instruction: Wait for Gemini's response to appear.
steps.coachText: Once the response is generated, you'll see action buttons below it for modifying and sharing.

steps.instruction: Locate the 'Modify response' button below the response.
steps.coachText: The Modify Response button lets you adjust the answer's length, tone, and complexity without re-prompting.

steps.instruction: Locate the 'Copy' button to copy the response.
steps.coachText: The Copy button copies the entire response text to your clipboard for pasting elsewhere.

steps.instruction: Locate the 'Share & export' button.
steps.coachText: Share & Export lets you share a link, export to Google Docs, or draft an email in Gmail with the response.

steps.instruction: Locate the 'Double-check' button for fact-checking.
steps.coachText: The Double-check button uses Google Search to verify claims in the response. Green highlights indicate supported facts, orange indicates uncertain claims.

title: Quick Action Chips
description: Learn how to use the Write, Plan, Research, and Learn quick-start chips to jump into common tasks.

steps.instruction: Open Gemini and locate the quick action chips below the prompt.
steps.coachText: Quick action chips provide one-tap templates for common tasks. Look for Write, Plan, Research, and Learn below the input box.

steps.instruction: Click the 'Write' chip.
steps.coachText: The Write chip sets up a writing-focused prompt. Gemini will help you draft essays, emails, stories, and more.

steps.instruction: Locate the 'Plan' chip.
steps.coachText: The Plan chip helps you create structured plans — trip itineraries, project timelines, study schedules, and more.

steps.instruction: Locate the 'Research' chip.
steps.coachText: The Research chip sets up a research-focused prompt. Gemini will gather and synthesize information from the web.

steps.instruction: Locate the 'Learn' chip.
steps.coachText: The Learn chip activates a learning-focused prompt mode. Use it to understand new concepts, get explanations, and study topics.

title: Choosing the Right AI Model
description: Learn the difference between Fast, Thinking, and Pro models and how to switch between them.

steps.instruction: Open Gemini and locate the model selector.
steps.coachText: The model selector shows the currently active model (like 'Fast'). Click it to switch between different AI capabilities.

steps.instruction: Click the model selector to open the dropdown.
steps.coachText: Click to see the available models: Fast, Thinking, and Pro.

steps.instruction: Review the model options: Fast, Thinking, and Pro.
steps.coachText: Fast answers quickly. Thinking solves complex reasoning problems step-by-step. Pro handles advanced math and code with Gemini 3.1 Pro.

steps.instruction: Select the 'Thinking' model.
steps.coachText: Thinking mode excels at complex reasoning, multi-step problems, and detailed analysis. Try it for harder questions.

steps.instruction: Type a complex reasoning prompt (e.g., 'Solve this step by step: If a train travels...').
steps.coachText: Thinking mode will show its reasoning process before giving the final answer.

steps.instruction: Send the prompt and observe the thinking process.
steps.coachText: Watch how Thinking mode breaks down the problem step-by-step before reaching its conclusion.
